calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-07-2024 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-28-2023 Continued To Mar-06-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Dec-01-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Maria Evangelista; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:40 am and concluding at 9:50 am.

Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Breau, Inc. appearing represented by Tiffanie Brown, Esq.
Defendant Repid Transport Inc. not appearing.

Plaintiff presents summary of facts, claims and an offer of proof.

BENJAMIN SEEMAN is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff and testifies.

Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Breau, Inc. submits the following exhibits for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Declaration of Benjamin Seeman

The matter is submitted.
By the statements made by Plaintiff and its counsel, documents filed, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Breau, Inc., and against Defendant Repid Transport Inc., as follows:

1. Damages: $30,563.24
2. Prejudgment Interest: $7,852.65
3. Costs: $510.63
4. Attorney fees: $2,825.00

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $41,751.52

Plaintiff's counsel is ordered to submit Proposed judgment for review and signature. (D505)

Notice Of Motion And Motion Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Oct-13-2023 Continued To Dec-01-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-14-2023 Continued To Jan-10-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
